description: window.serve_plus1 → 1: Window parameters untested; reducing serve_plus1 from 2 to 1 will tighten the immediate post-serve context window to isolate serve-dependent second-shot patterns more precisely, directly testing whether coarser temporal resolution breaks the calibration bottleneck where 13 consecutive neutral/revert experiments suggest archetype geometry is overfit to multi-shot windows that dilute serve signal strength.
